flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lurleen B Wallace Community College fell 38% between 2007 and 2010 (41.5% → 25.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lurleen B Wallace Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lurleen B Wallace Community College rose 46% between 2009 and 2010 (17.8% → 25.9%).
